title: Morals for Men
writer: Gouverneur Morris, Philbin Stoneman, Andrew Percival Younger
actors: Conway Tearle, Agnes Ayres, Alyce Mills
plot: Joe Strickland, a civil engineer, has fallen to the level of living off Bessie Hayes, a bootlegger. Bessie believes Joe is trying to steal their savings, and they decide to part. She opens a manicuring establishment and marries we...
